title: micromeles decaisneana var. keissleri
intro: Micromeles decaisneana var. keissleri, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, characterized by its thorny branches and small, white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as a digestive aid. The health benefits of Micromeles decaisneana var. keissleri include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against heart disease and other cardiovascular conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and digestive function.
